title: dampiera eriocephala
intro: Dampiera eriocephala, a native Australian plant belonging to the family Goodeniaceae, is commonly known as the woolly dampiera. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Dampiera eriocephala include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Dampiera eriocephala are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
